    C

    calculateEndDayCosts(WorldMap, Player) - Static method in class jogo.engine.GameEngine
    Calculates the resources that will be consumed by a specific player's structures at the end of the day.
    canInteract() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if the owner of a structure can interact with it.
    canInteract(int, int, Player) - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMap
    Validates whether a player is authorized to interact with a specific map coordinate.
    canInteractOutsideMap() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if interacting outside the map boundaries throws CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException.
    canInteractThrowsStructureDontExistException() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if interacting with an empty map position throws StructureDontExistException.
    canInteractThrowsUnauthorizedActionException() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMapTest
    Tests if a player cannot interact with a structure that belongs to another player.
    center(StructuresType) - Method in class jogo.screens.StructuresBuildingInfoScreen
    Compiles the central details specifications panel using tabular matrix rows fed by the factory.
    City - Class in jogo.models.Structures
    Represents a City structure in the game world.
    City(Player, int) - Constructor for class jogo.models.Structures.City
    Constructs a new City structure, initializing its base stats and expanding the owning player's maximum Action Points.
    CITY - Enum constant in enum class jogo.models.Structures.StructuresType
    Represents an administrative hub that expands baseline action potential and grants victory points.
    CityTest - Class in models.Structures
    Test class for the City class.
    CityTest() - Constructor for class models.Structures.CityTest
     
    cleaningInventoryCorrectly() - Method in class models.PlayerTest
    Tests if the inventory is cleared correctly.
    clearInventory() - Method in class jogo.models.Player
    Sets the quantity of all valid in-game resources to zero.
    consumeResources() - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMap
    Iterates through the entire map grid to trigger daily resource consumption for all structures.
    consumeResources() - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
    Deducts the current maintenance fees from the owner's inventory.
    CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException - Exception Class in jogo.exceptions
    Thrown when the requested grid coordinates fall outside the valid boundaries of the world map.
    CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class jogo.exceptions.CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException
    Constructs a new CoordinatesOutOfBoundsException detailing the invalid coordinates.
    create(StructuresType, Player, int) - Static method in class jogo.models.Structures.CreateStructure
    Factory method that instantiates a concrete subclass of Structures based on the provided type identifier.
    createScene() - Method in class jogo.screens.CreateStructureScreen
    Assembles the main user interface components, binds layout nodes, applies stylesheet configurations, and wraps the tree layout inside a definitive Scene.
    createScene() - Method in class jogo.screens.EndScreen
    Assembles the graphical layout nodes, binds victory icons, parses metrics, and wraps the final summary presentation within a configured Scene.
    createScene() - Method in class jogo.screens.MainGameScreen
     
    createScene() - Method in class jogo.screens.MapCellScreen
    Assembles the structural container layout tree, initializes contextual routing buttons, appends event triggers, and loads external stylesheets.
    createScene() - Method in class jogo.screens.SelectPlayersNameScreen
    Compiles the central interactive configuration catalog nodes, hooks form submission logic, appends verification feedback components, and locks styling references inside a target Scene wrapper.
    createScene() - Method in class jogo.screens.StartScreen
    Initializes structural menu container nodes, binds selection actions, anchors decorative graphic iconography, and packs the central card within a target Scene layout.
    createScene() - Method in class jogo.screens.StructureScreen
    Queries structural data from the grid, populates descriptive layout containers, appends action handlers, and builds a comprehensive target inspection Scene.
    createScene(int, int) - Method in class jogo.screens.UpgradeStructureScreen
    Builds and structures baseline sub-panels components, handles runtime query exceptions safely, and maps node elements inside an optimized viewport Scene bounds.
    createScreen(StructuresType, int, int) - Method in class jogo.screens.StructuresBuildingInfoScreen
    Compiles sub-panels layout layers, binds building parameters dynamically, and maps boundaries inside a dedicated container Scene.
    createStructure(WorldMap, Player, StructuresType, int, int, int) - Static method in class jogo.engine.GameEngine
    Constructs and places a structure on the map at the specified coordinates.
    CreateStructure - Class in jogo.models.Structures
    Factory and utility class responsible for instantiating game structures and retrieving their baseline costs and requirements.
    CreateStructure() - Constructor for class jogo.models.Structures.CreateStructure
     
    CreateStructureScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering the structure selection menu.
    CreateStructureScreen(Stage, GameSession, int, int, Runnable) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.CreateStructureScreen
    Constructs a new CreateStructureScreen bound to a specific map grid coordinate.
    CreateStructureTest - Class in models.Structures
    Test class for the CreateStructure class.
    CreateStructureTest() - Constructor for class models.Structures.CreateStructureTest
